description: Expedia is an online travel platform from Expedia Group for searching and booking lodging, flights, cars, packages, activities, cruises, and related travel services. Expedia Group also operates partner and supplier platforms that let approved businesses integrate travel inventory, booking flows, analytics, and lodging connectivity.
summary: Expedia exposes a public MCP endpoint plus partner-only HTTP APIs including Rapid API, Travel Redirect API, and the Analytics Subscriptions API; docs also describe additional Connectivity Hub APIs but the retrieved pages did not reveal callable base URLs or machine-readable specs.
